corrections.description: The entire article file content is from a different article (Mothers in Israel by Joseph Fielding Smith) than what appears in the page image (Cultural Refinement lesson about Robert Browning)
corrections.text:
CULTURAL REFINEMENT

Ideals of Womanhood in Relation to Home and the Family

Lesson 5—Principles With a Promise—Faith and Optimism

Textbook: Out of the Best Books, volumes 1, 2, 3, 4, 5
By Bruce B. Clark and Robert K. Thomas

Northern Hemisphere: Fourth meeting, March 1971
Southern Hemisphere: Fourth meeting, July 1971

OBJECTIVE: To encourage a woman to exercise faith and optimism as illustrated in the writings of Robert Browning.
